message:
fix: show median fix time instead of avg, add median to sparkline history (#183)

Avg is heavily skewed by long-tail outliers (36d slowest). Median (1.95h)
is a more honest representation. Sparkline history buckets now emit
median alongside avg at 6hr intervals over 30 days. Tooltip still shows
avg, p90, fastest, slowest for full context.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -280,8 +280,9 @@ cutoff = time.time()*1000 - $ITM_BACKFILL_DAYS*86400000
 history = []
 for t in sorted(bucketed.keys()):
     if t < cutoff: continue
-    vals = bucketed[t]
-    history.append({'t': t, 'avg': round(sum(vals)/len(vals))})
+    vals = sorted(bucketed[t])
+    bucket_median = vals[len(vals)//2]
+    history.append({'t': t, 'avg': round(sum(vals)/len(vals)), 'median': bucket_median})
 
 result = {
     'avg_minutes': avg, 'median_minutes': median, 'p90_minutes': p90,
